descFull: OplaPlanner has moved to https://github.com/apache/incubator-kie-drools. This repository is archived. OptaPlanner is an AI constraint solver in Java to optimize the vehicle routing problem, employee rostering, task assignment, maintenance scheduling, conference scheduling and other planning problems.
